team_name: Pre-Trained Language Model Augmented with Knowledge
summary: Design a technical platform using Knowledge-Enhanced Pre-trained Language Models (KE-PLMs) for AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement.
optimization_claims: Improves traditional language models by integrating external knowledge sources
Enhances reasoning, factual accuracy, and contextual understanding
constraints_addressed: Natural Language Understanding (NLU) and Natural Language Generation (NLG) tasks
